reason: Modal infrastructure preempted the original jlens seed256 worker after public eval nodes 0,2,4,6 and before a terminal manifest; the V16 fail-closed policy forbids resuming or counting that partial run.

replacement_rule.trigger: first V16 treatment run lacking a verified terminal completion solely because of infrastructure preemption

frozen_science.control_difference: negate only the two component weights

analysis.primary_treatment_vs_initial_effect_per_: mean over steps 2,4,6,8,10 of treatment exact_match minus that seed's step-0 exact_match
analysis.primary_test: two-sided exact sign test across the 16 complete treatment seeds
analysis.matched_effect_per_seed: mean over steps 2,4,6,8,10 of treatment exact_match minus matched signflip exact_match
analysis.matched_test: two-sided exact sign test across the 16 complete pairs
analysis.missing_or_preempted_runs: fail closed and do not count; apply the next-unused-seed replacement rule without inspecting replacement outcomes
